cities.name: Jaipur
cities.description: The 'Pink City' of India, Jaipur is a flamboyant showcase of Rajasthani architecture, royal palaces, and vibrant local markets.

activities.title: Amer Fort Elephant Ride
activities.description: Experience a royal ascent to the massive Amer Fort on elephant back.

activities.title: Hawa Mahal Exploration
activities.description: Visit the 'Palace of Winds' with its 953 small windows designed for royal ladies.

activities.title: Chokhi Dhani Village Experience
activities.description: An ethnic village resort offering traditional Rajasthani food and cultural performances.

activities.title: Jantar Mantar Observatory
activities.description: Explore the UNESCO world heritage site featuring the world's largest stone sundial.

activities.title: Hot Air Balloon Safari
activities.description: Fly over the forts and palaces of Jaipur at sunrise.

activities.title: Nahargarh Fort Sunset View
activities.description: Watch the city light up from the edge of the Aravalli hills.

activities.title: Johari Bazaar Shopping
activities.description: Shop for authentic Kundan jewelry and traditional gemstones.

activities.title: City Palace Museum Tour
activities.description: A complex of courtyards, gardens and buildings in the heart of the Old City.

activities.title: Galta Ji (Monkey Temple)
activities.description: An ancient Hindu pilgrimage site known for its natural springs and resident monkeys.

activities.title: Albert Hall Museum Visit
activities.description: The oldest museum in Rajasthan, showcasing Indo-Saracenic architecture.

cities.name: Varanasi
cities.description: Varanasi is one of the world's oldest continually inhabited cities and the spiritual heart of India.

activities.title: Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat
activities.description: A spiritual ceremony with fire and chants performed every evening.

activities.title: Sunrise Boat Ride on Ganges
activities.description: A peaceful boat trip to see the morning rituals on the various ghats.

activities.title: Sarnath Day Trip
activities.description: Visit the place where Lord Buddha gave his first sermon.

activities.title: Banaras Silk Saree Shopping
activities.description: Explore local looms and buy world-famous Banarasi silk.

activities.title: Kashi Vishwanath Temple Visit
activities.description: Visit one of the 12 Jyotirlingas, the most sacred temple of Lord Shiva.

activities.title: Old City Food Trail
activities.description: Taste local delicacies like Malaiyo, Tamatar Chaat, and Banarasi Paan.

activities.title: Manikarnika Ghat Walk
activities.description: Observe the cycle of life and death at the main cremation ghat (with respect).

activities.title: Ramnagar Fort Exploration
activities.description: Visit the 18th-century sandstone fort on the eastern bank of the Ganges.

activities.title: Assi Ghat Music & Yoga
activities.description: Join Subah-e-Banaras for morning yoga and classical music.

activities.title: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Campus
activities.description: Tour one of the largest residential universities in Asia.

cities.name: Kochi
cities.description: Kochi is a vibrant city situated on the southwest coast of India, known for its colonial history and spice trade.

activities.title: Chinese Fishing Nets at Sunset
activities.description: Watch fishermen operate the iconic cantilevered fishing nets.

activities.title: Fort Kochi Heritage Walk
activities.description: Explore the Jewish Synagogue, St. Francis Church, and Dutch Palace.

activities.title: Kathakali Performance
activities.description: Watch the traditional classical dance drama of Kerala.

activities.title: Backwater Houseboat Cruise
activities.description: Navigate the serene backwaters on a luxury wooden boat.

activities.title: Jew Town Antique Shopping
activities.description: Shop for vintage artifacts, spices, and perfumes in the narrow lanes.

activities.title: Kalaripayattu Martial Arts Show
activities.description: Witness the oldest martial art form in the world.

activities.title: Marine Drive Promenade
activities.description: A scenic walkway facing the backwaters of Kochi.

activities.title: Hill Palace Museum
activities.description: Visit the largest archaeological museum in Kerala.

activities.title: Cherai Beach Sunbath
activities.description: Relax at the junction of the sea and the backwaters.

activities.title: Munnar Tea Estate Day Trip
activities.description: Travel to the lush tea gardens in the nearby Western Ghats.

cities.name: Agra
cities.description: Agra is the home of the Taj Mahal, a symbol of eternal love and one of the Seven Wonders of the World.

activities.title: Taj Mahal Sunrise Visit
activities.description: Witness the marble mausoleum change colors as the sun rises.

activities.title: Agra Fort Exploration
activities.description: Tour the massive red sandstone fort that was the main residence of the Mughal Emperors.

activities.title: Fatehpur Sikri Day Trip
activities.description: Visit the abandoned Mughal city and its stunning Buland Darwaza.

activities.title: Mehtab Bagh Sunset View
activities.description: View the Taj Mahal from across the Yamuna River without the crowds.

activities.title: Itmad-ud-Daula (Baby Taj)
activities.description: Explore the intricate marble inlay work in this exquisite tomb.

activities.title: Agra Petha Tasting
activities.description: Sample the famous local sweet made from ash gourd.

activities.title: Kinari Bazaar Heritage Walk
activities.description: A narrow lane bazaar perfect for traditional embroidery and bridal wear.

activities.title: Akbar's Tomb, Sikandra
activities.description: Visit the final resting place of the great Mughal Emperor Akbar.

activities.title: Kalakriti Cultural Show
activities.description: Watch 'Mohabbat-the-Taj', a theatrical show depicting the story of Taj Mahal.

activities.title: Wildlife SOS Conservation Tour
activities.description: Visit the rescue center for elephants and sloth bears.

cities.name: Mumbai
cities.description: The financial capital of India, Mumbai is a city of dreams, colonial history, and a bustling film industry.

activities.title: Gateway of India Visit
activities.description: The iconic arch monument overlooking the Arabian Sea.

activities.title: Elephanta Caves Boat Trip
activities.description: A UNESCO site featuring ancient rock-cut temples dedicated to Shiva.

activities.title: Marine Drive Evening Walk
activities.description: A 3.6 km long boulevard along the coast, known as the Queen's Necklace.

activities.title: Dharavi Guided Tour
activities.description: An insightful tour of the local industries and community spirit in the heart of the city.

activities.title: Colaba Causeway Shopping
activities.description: The ultimate street shopping destination for fashion and artifacts.

activities.title: Siddhivinayak Temple Darshan
activities.description: Visit the famous Ganesha temple frequented by celebrities.

activities.title: Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus (CST) View
activities.description: Admire the Victorian Gothic Revival architecture of this historic station.

activities.title: Juhu Beach Street Food
activities.description: Try Mumbai's Pav Bhaji and Vada Pav at the famous beach front.

activities.title: Bandra-Worli Sea Link Drive
activities.description: A scenic drive across the modern cable-stayed bridge.

activities.title: Bollywood Studio Tour
activities.description: Get a behind-the-scenes look at a film set and dance shows.

cities.name: Ahmedabad
cities.description: India's first UNESCO World Heritage City, known for its incredible architecture, textile history, and the Sabarmati Ashram.

activities.title: Sabarmati Ashram Visit
activities.description: The humble residence of Mahatma Gandhi and a museum dedicated to the Indian independence movement.

activities.title: Adalaj Stepwell Exploration
activities.description: Marvel at the intricate Solanki style architecture of this 5th-century underground water building.

activities.title: Manek Chowk Night Market
activities.description: Experience the ultimate street food heaven that starts in a jewelry market square at night.

activities.title: Sidi Saiyyed Mosque
activities.description: See the famous 'Tree of Life' stone lattice work (Jali) windows.

activities.title: Kankaria Lake Evening
activities.description: Enjoy the amusement park, zoo, and water shows around this massive circular lake.

activities.title: Akshardham Temple Trip
activities.description: A massive sandstone temple complex with beautiful gardens and a laser water show.

activities.title: Calico Museum of Textiles
activities.description: One of the finest textile museums in the world showcasing antique Indian fabrics.

activities.title: Heritage Walk in Old City
activities.description: Navigate the narrow 'Pols' (neighborhoods) and see the traditional wooden houses.

activities.title: Auto World Vintage Car Museum
activities.description: View a vast collection of rare vintage cars from all over the world.

activities.title: Science City Visit
activities.description: Explore the aquatic gallery, robotics gallery, and planetarium.

cities.name: Surat
cities.description: The 'Diamond City' of India, known for its diamond polishing and flourishing textile industry.

activities.title: Dumas Beach Visit
activities.description: A popular urban beach known for its black sand and local food stalls.

activities.title: Dutch Garden Exploration
activities.description: A historic garden containing the mausoleums of Dutch and British officials.

activities.title: Surat Castle (Old Fort)
activities.description: A 16th-century fortification on the banks of the Tapi river.

activities.title: Textile Market Shopping
activities.description: Explore the massive markets for wholesale fabrics and silk sarees.

activities.title: Gopi Talav Evening
activities.description: Relax at this renovated lake with fountains and recreational zones.

activities.title: Science Centre & Planetarium
activities.description: A modern multi-facility hub with a museum, art gallery, and amphitheater.

activities.title: Surat Diamond Bourse Visit
activities.description: Visit the world's largest office building, dedicated to the diamond trade.

activities.title: Ambika Niketan Temple
activities.description: A popular pilgrimage site on the banks of the Tapi River.

activities.title: Suvali Beach Day Trip
activities.description: A quieter, cleaner beach away from the city noise.

activities.title: Street Food at Night
activities.description: Try the legendary Surat Locho, Ponk, and Ghari sweets.

cities.name: Vadodara
cities.description: The cultural capital of Gujarat, famous for its magnificent palaces and the world-renowned MSU.

activities.title: Laxmi Vilas Palace Tour
activities.description: Visit the majestic residence of the royal family, four times the size of Buckingham Palace.

activities.title: Sayaji Baug (Kamati Baug)
activities.description: A huge park featuring a zoo, museum, planetarium, and a flower clock.

activities.title: Champaner-Pavagadh Day Trip
activities.description: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage site featuring Islamic architecture and a hilltop temple.

activities.title: Baroda Museum & Picture Gallery
activities.description: Admire a vast collection of artifacts, paintings, and a blue whale skeleton.

activities.title: Statue of Unity Day Trip
activities.description: Visit the world's tallest statue, dedicated to Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel.

activities.title: EME Temple (Dakshinamurti Temple)
activities.description: A unique geodesic dome temple built with aluminum sheets by the Indian Army.

activities.title: Kirti Stambh (Tower of Fame)
activities.description: A prominent landmark symbolizing the victory of the Maratha rulers.

activities.title: Inorbit Mall Shopping
activities.description: Shop for luxury brands and enjoy the modern food court.

activities.title: Sursagar Lake Evening
activities.description: Watch the sunset by the lake featuring a 120-foot statue of Lord Shiva.

activities.title: Navratri Festival Celebration
activities.description: Experience the world's longest dance festival with Garba performances.

cities.name: Rajkot
cities.description: A hub of industry and culture in Saurashtra, known for its colonial history and vibrant markets.

activities.title: Watson Museum
activities.description: One of the oldest museums in Gujarat showcasing Saurashtra's history.

activities.title: Kaba Gandhi No Delo
activities.description: The childhood home of Mahatma Gandhi, now a museum.

activities.title: Rotary Dolls Museum
activities.description: A unique collection of dolls from across the world representing various cultures.

activities.title: Nyari Dam Visit
activities.description: A scenic spot on the outskirts of the city, perfect for picnics.

activities.title: Bangdi Bazaar Shopping
activities.description: Famous for traditional glass and metal bangles and Bandhani sarees.

activities.title: Aji Dam Evening
activities.description: Enjoy the gardens and bird watching at this major city reservoir.

activities.title: Swaminarayan Temple Visit
activities.description: A grand white marble temple complex with intricate carvings.

activities.title: Race Course Grounds
activities.description: A large park with sports facilities, gardens, and walking tracks.

activities.title: Ishwariya Park
activities.description: A beautiful hilltop park with a musical fountain and children's play area.

activities.title: Kathiyawadi Food Tour
activities.description: Try authentic local dishes like Ringan no Oro and Vagharelo Rotlo.

cities.name: Bhavnagar
cities.description: A coastal city with a rich trading history, serving as a gateway to the Palitana Jain temples.

activities.title: Palitana Temple Trek
activities.description: Climb over 3,000 steps to reach the world's only mountain with over 800 Jain temples.

activities.title: Blackbuck National Park (Velavadar)
activities.description: Spot herds of Blackbucks and rare birds in this unique grassland park.

activities.title: Nilambag Palace Stay
activities.description: Experience heritage luxury at the residence of the Bhavnagar royal family.

activities.title: Takhteshwar Temple View
activities.description: A white marble temple located on a hill offering panoramic city views.

activities.title: Gaurishankar Lake Evening
activities.description: A peaceful lake and park perfect for bird watching and walking.

activities.title: Barton Museum Visit
activities.description: One of the oldest museums in Gujarat with an extensive collection of coins.

activities.title: Victoria Park Walk
activities.description: A protected forest within the city limits, home to various flora and fauna.

activities.title: Alang Ship Breaking Yard
activities.description: Observe the massive ship-scrapping operations (requires permission).

activities.title: Gandhi Smriti Institution
activities.description: A center dedicated to Gandhian philosophy with a library and gallery.

activities.title: Bhavnagar Street Food Trail
activities.description: Famous for Bhavnagari Ganthiya and spicy Pav Bhaji.

cities.name: Jamnagar
cities.description: Known as the 'Jewel of Kathiawar', famous for its marine national park and exquisite brass industry.

activities.title: Marine National Park (Pirotan)
activities.description: Explore India's first marine park and see coral reefs and dolphins.

activities.title: Lakhota Lake and Palace
activities.description: An island palace in the middle of a lake, now a museum.

activities.title: Khijadiya Bird Sanctuary
activities.description: A unique wetland habitat where sea water and fresh water meet.

activities.title: Bala Hanuman Temple
activities.description: World-famous for its continuous chanting of 'Ram Dhun' since 1964.

activities.title: Bandhani Shopping in Old City
activities.description: Buy world-class tie-dye fabrics from the masters of the craft.

activities.title: Pratap Vilas Palace Visit
activities.description: A European-styled palace with intricate carvings and lush gardens.

activities.title: Darbargadh Palace Exploration
activities.description: The old royal residence showing a mix of Rajput and European architecture.

activities.title: Brass Industry Tour
activities.description: Learn about the mass production of brass parts exported globally.

activities.title: Sivrajpur Beach Day Trip
activities.description: Relax at this pristine 'Blue Flag' certified beach near Jamnagar.

activities.title: Bhujiyo Kotho Viewpoint
activities.description: An old tower offering great views of the city and its surrounding areas.

cities.name: Junagadh
cities.description: Located at the foot of Girnar Hill, this city is a melting pot of Hindu, Buddhist, and Islamic history.

activities.title: Girnar Hill Trek
activities.description: Climb 10,000 steps to reach the sacred temples at the mountain peak.

activities.title: Uparkot Fort Exploration
activities.description: Tour the 2,300-year-old fort featuring Buddhist caves and ancient stepwells.

activities.title: Mahabat Maqbara
activities.description: Visit the most stunning mausoleum in Gujarat with its unique spiral staircases.

activities.title: Gir National Park Safari
activities.description: Go on a jeep safari to see the only Asiatic Lions in the world.

activities.title: Sakkarbaug Zoological Garden
activities.description: One of India's oldest zoos, famous for breeding Asiatic Lions.

activities.title: Ashoka Rock Edicts
activities.description: View 14 edicts of the great Emperor Ashoka carved into a boulder.

activities.title: Buddhist Caves Visit
activities.description: Explore the rock-cut cave systems used by monks thousands of years ago.

activities.title: Damodar Kund Holy Dip
activities.description: A sacred lake at the foot of Girnar, popular for spiritual rituals.

activities.title: Darbar Hall Museum
activities.description: View the royal collection including weapons, costumes, and paintings.

activities.title: Somnath Temple Trip
activities.description: Day trip to the magnificent first Jyotirlinga on the coast.

cities.name: Delhi
cities.description: The capital of India, a historic metropolis blending Mughal grandeur with British colonial architecture.

activities.title: Red Fort Exploration
activities.description: Tour the iconic sandstone palace complex of Mughal emperors.

activities.title: Qutub Minar Visit
activities.description: Admire the world's tallest brick minaret and its surrounding ancient complex.

activities.title: Humayun's Tomb Walk
activities.description: Explore the precursor to the Taj Mahal, set in lush Persian-style gardens.

activities.title: Chandni Chowk Food Tour
activities.description: Taste the best parathas, jalebis, and chaat in the heart of Old Delhi.

activities.title: Lotus Temple Meditation
activities.description: Visit the Bahá'í House of Worship known for its flowerlike shape and silence.

activities.title: India Gate & Kartavya Path
activities.description: A war memorial arch and a central ceremonial boulevard of India.

activities.title: Akshardham Temple Experience
activities.description: A massive spiritual complex with boat rides and musical fountains.

activities.title: Dilli Haat Shopping
activities.description: Open-air food and craft bazaar representing different Indian states.

activities.title: Jama Masjid Visit
activities.description: One of the largest mosques in India, built by Shah Jahan.

activities.title: Lodhi Garden Evening Walk
activities.description: A favorite spot for locals featuring 15th-century Sayyid and Lodi tombs.

cities.name: Amritsar
cities.description: The spiritual and cultural center of the Sikh religion, famous for the Golden Temple.

activities.title: Golden Temple (Harmandir Sahib)
activities.description: The holiest Gurdwara, famous for its architecture and communal kitchen (Langar).

activities.title: Wagah Border Ceremony
activities.description: Watch the high-energy military ceremony at the India-Pakistan border.

activities.title: Jallianwala Bagh Memorial
activities.description: A tragic historical site commemorating the 1919 massacre victims.

activities.title: Partition Museum Visit
activities.description: The world's first museum dedicated to the memories of the 1947 Partition.

activities.title: Amritsari Kulcha Trail
activities.description: Savor the crispy, buttery local stuffed bread at authentic dhabas.

activities.title: Hall Bazaar Shopping
activities.description: Famous for Phulkari embroidery, traditional footwear, and spices.

activities.title: Ram Tirath Temple
activities.description: The ancient ashram of Valmiki where Sita took refuge.

activities.title: Durgiana Temple Visit
activities.description: Often called the Silver Temple, it bears a striking resemblance to the Golden Temple.

activities.title: Gobindgarh Fort Show
activities.description: Watch a multimedia sound and light show on the history of Punjab.

activities.title: Sadda Pind Village Experience
activities.description: A Punjabi culture living village museum with folk dance and food.

cities.name: Udaipur
cities.description: The 'City of Lakes' or 'Venice of the East', known for its romantic palaces and stunning artificial lakes.

activities.title: City Palace Tour
activities.description: Explore the largest palace complex in Rajasthan overlooking Lake Pichola.

activities.title: Lake Pichola Boat Ride
activities.description: A scenic boat trip during sunset to view the Lake Palace and Jag Mandir.

activities.title: Bagore Ki Haveli Dance Show
activities.description: Watch 'Dharohar', a vibrant Rajasthani folk dance and puppet show.

activities.title: Jagdish Temple Visit
activities.description: A grand Indo-Aryan temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu in the heart of the city.

activities.title: Saheliyon-ki-Bari Garden
activities.description: Tour the 'Garden of the Maidens' with its fountains and marble elephants.

activities.title: Sajjangarh (Monsoon Palace)
activities.description: A hilltop palace offering panoramic views of the city's lakes and palaces.

activities.title: Shilpgram Craft Village
activities.description: An ethnographic museum and rural arts center showcasing tribal culture.

activities.title: Fateh Sagar Lake evening
activities.description: Enjoy snacks at 'Bombay Market' and walk along the lake's promenade.

activities.title: Vintage Car Collection Museum
activities.description: View the royal car collection including the 1934 Rolls-Royce Phantom.

activities.title: Hathi Pol Bazaar Shopping
activities.description: Shop for traditional Pichwai and Phad paintings and Rajasthani mojris.

cities.name: Mysore
cities.description: The cultural capital of Karnataka, known for its royal heritage and majestic Mysore Palace.

activities.title: Mysore Palace Visit
activities.description: Admire the Indo-Saracenic architecture and its illumination on Sundays.

activities.title: Chamundi Hill Climb
activities.description: Climb 1,000 steps to the temple at the top and see the massive Nandi statue.

activities.title: Brindavan Gardens Walk
activities.description: Enjoy the terrace gardens and musical fountain show in the evening.

activities.title: Devaraja Market Exploration
activities.description: A historic, vibrant market selling silk, incense, and sandalwood oil.

activities.title: Mysore Zoo (Chamarajendra)
activities.description: One of the oldest and most popular zoos in India.

activities.title: St. Philomena's Church
activities.description: Visit one of the tallest churches in India, inspired by Cologne Cathedral.

activities.title: Jaganmohan Palace Gallery
activities.description: A former palace turned art gallery with paintings by Raja Ravi Varma.

activities.title: Seringapatam Day Trip
activities.description: Explore the historic capital of Tipu Sultan near Mysore.

activities.title: Mysore Pak Tasting
activities.description: Try the legendary melt-in-mouth local sweet at its birthplace.

activities.title: Sand Sculpture Museum
activities.description: A unique museum showcasing giant sculptures made entirely of sand.

cities.name: Shimla
cities.description: The 'Queen of Hills', once the summer capital of British India, known for its colonial buildings and scenic landscapes.
cities.bestTime: March to June / November to February (Snow)

activities.title: The Ridge & Mall Road Walk
activities.description: The hub of the city with colonial architecture, cafes, and views of the Himalayas.

activities.title: Toy Train Ride (Kalka-Shimla)
activities.description: A UNESCO heritage railway ride through tunnels and pine forests.

activities.title: Jakhu Temple Hike
activities.description: A short trek to the temple of Lord Hanuman featuring a 108-foot statue.

activities.title: Viceregal Lodge Tour
activities.description: Visit the Scottish Baronial style former summer residence of British Viceroys.

activities.title: Kufri Adventure Trip
activities.description: Head to Kufri for horse riding and snow sports (in winter).

activities.title: Christ Church Visit
activities.description: The second oldest church in North India, famous for its neo-Gothic design.

activities.title: Himachal State Museum
activities.description: Explore the collection of Pahari paintings and ancient sculptures.

activities.title: Chadwick Falls Exploration
activities.description: A beautiful waterfall surrounded by dense deodar and pine forests.

activities.title: Summer Hill Picnic
activities.description: A quiet residential area offering peaceful walks and hillside views.

activities.title: Lakkar Bazaar Wood Shopping
activities.description: Famous for wooden toys, walking sticks, and handcrafted furniture.

cities.name: Manali
cities.description: A high-altitude Himalayan resort town, popular for its snow sports and as a gateway for adventure.

activities.title: Solang Valley Adventure
activities.description: Enjoy paragliding, zorbing, and skiing in this breathtaking valley.

activities.title: Rohtang Pass Trip
activities.description: Travel to this high mountain pass for year-round snow (requires permit).

activities.title: Hadimba Devi Temple
activities.description: A wooden temple built in 1553, located in a cedar forest.

activities.title: Beas River Rafting
activities.description: Experience white water rafting in the cold waters of the Beas.

activities.title: Old Manali Cafe Crawl
activities.description: Explore the bohemian vibes and riverside cafes of Old Manali.

activities.title: Jogini Falls Trek
activities.description: A gentle trek to a scenic waterfall overlooking the Beas river.

activities.title: Vashisht Hot Springs
activities.description: Natural sulfur hot springs located near an ancient temple.

activities.title: Naggar Castle Exploration
activities.description: Visit this medieval castle built in local stone and wood architecture.

activities.title: Mall Road Shopping
activities.description: Shop for Kullu shawls, local handicrafts, and dry fruits.

activities.title: Atal Tunnel Drive
activities.description: Travel through the world's longest single-tube highway tunnel above 10,000 feet.

cities.name: Nainital
cities.description: A beautiful hill station centered around the pear-shaped Naini Lake, set in the Kumaon region.

activities.title: Naini Lake Boating
activities.description: Enjoy a peaceful boat ride on the emerald waters of Naini Lake.

activities.title: Snow View Point by Ropeway
activities.description: Ride a cable car to see the panoramic views of the high Himalayan peaks.

activities.title: Naina Devi Temple
activities.description: Visit the sacred temple of Goddess Naina Devi on the northern shore of the lake.

activities.title: Tiffin Top (Dorothy's Seat)
activities.description: A short hike to a viewpoint offering a stunning view of Nainital city.

activities.title: Nainital Zoo Exploration
activities.description: Visit the high-altitude zoo, home to snow leopards and Himalayan bears.

activities.title: Mall Road evening
activities.description: Stroll along the lakefront road lined with shops and restaurants.

activities.title: Eco Cave Gardens
activities.description: Explore the interconnected rocky caves and hanging gardens.

activities.title: St. John Wilderness Church
activities.description: An old neo-Gothic church surrounded by pine and deodar forests.

activities.title: Bhimtal Day Trip
activities.description: Visit the nearby town of Bhimtal, famous for its large lake and island museum.

activities.title: Governor's House (Raj Bhavan)
activities.description: Tour the magnificent Victorian-style building set in large gardens.
